results.title: Black Velvet - Adapted From Paula Deen
results.creditsText: Foodista.com – The Cooking Encyclopedia Everyone Can Edit
results.summary: Black Velvet - Adapted From Paula Deen is a hor d'oeuvre that serves 6. For 79 cents per serving, this recipe covers 15% of your daily requirements of vitamins and minerals. One serving contains 314 calories, 11g of protein, and 10g of fat. This recipe from Foodista requires flour, buttermilk, onyx cocoa powder, and baking soda. Not a lot of people made this recipe, and 1 would say it hit the spot. From preparation to the plate, this recipe takes roughly 45 minutes. Overall, this recipe earns a solid spoonacular score of 44%. Try Paula Deen Red Velvet Cupcake, Paula's Best Beef Stroganoff-Paula Deen, and Pralines by Paula Deen for similar recipes.
